rationale.root_cause: Model diagnoses assertion failure in arena.c:391 instead of the required defect at parser.c:852.
rationale.local_fix: Model proposes unrelated change in arena.c; required patch moves current_rule_idx/next_rule_idx assignments inside yr_parser_reduce_rule_declaration_phase_1.
rationale.global_fix: Model attributes failure to buffer offset management rather than incorrect timing of rule index updates that cause later arena accesses to be invalid.
